name: resend

setup.init:
import { Resend } from 'resend';
const resend = new Resend(process.env.RESEND_API_KEY);

send_with_react.description: Send an email using a React component as template

api_route.description: Next.js API route for sending emails

common_mistakes: Using 'onboarding@resend.dev' in production -- only works for testing to your own email
Not verifying your domain in Resend dashboard before sending
Sending from a gmail/hotmail address -- must use your own domain
